_meta.description: Persistent build model for o9nn/org-oc. Self-updated by each iteration of the optimizer. DO NOT edit manually — use scripts/run_iteration.py to refine.

errors: Requires ROS catkin — not available on ubuntu-latest runners

atomspace-ipfs.disabled_reason: Requires ipfs client library (not available via apt)

errors: CogAgentsConfig.cmake.in missing from lib/ directory — repo structure issue

atomspace-dht.disabled_reason: uses private AtomTable.h header not installed by atomspace

errors: Uses IndefiniteTruthValue.h which no longer exists in atomspace

CMake Deprecation Warning at CMakeLists.txt:1 (cmake_minimum_required):
  Compatibility with CMake < 3.10 will be removed from a future version of
  CMake.

  Update the VERSION argument <min> value.
TinyCog.disabled_reason: needs Festival dev headers not available on Ubuntu 24.04, plus OpenCV and AtomSpace

atomese-simd.disabled_reason: Requires OpenCL or CUDA (not available on GHA ubuntu-latest)

errors: Requires ROS catkin — not available on ubuntu-latest runners

missing_header.regex: fatal error: (.+\.h): No such file or directory
missing_header.diagnosis: Missing system header — need to install development package

missing_cmake_package.regex: Could not find a package configuration file provided by "(\w+)"
missing_cmake_package.diagnosis: Missing CMake package — upstream component not installed

missing_find_package.diagnosis: Missing Find module — upstream component not installed or CMake path wrong

undefined_reference.diagnosis: Linker error — library not linked or not installed

missing_shared_lib.diagnosis: Shared library not found at runtime — ldconfig needed or lib path wrong

cython_error.diagnosis: Cython not installed or version mismatch

permission_denied.diagnosis: Build trying to install to system path without sudo

iteration_log.root_cause: libmpi-dev not available on Ubuntu 24.04 Noble → replaced with libopenmpi-dev
Artifact upload failed: colons in language-learning/data/ paths. Replaced workspace-artifact pattern with per-job checkout.
iteration_log.architectural_change: system_setup no longer uploads workspace artifact. Each component job does its own actions/checkout@v4.

_fixes.description: Artifact restore must use /usr/local/ as target, not /
_fixes.root_cause: upload-artifact@v4 strips LCA (/usr/local) from paths; restore with `cp -r /tmp/*-install/* /` puts files at /include/opencog instead of /usr/local/include/opencog
